title: Cross Account Functionality

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
I work across a few monday.com accounts, as do some of the people I work with.
Although switching accounts isn’t difficult, it would be FANTASTIC if there could be some element of cross account functionality.

As an example - Say I work with a designer who uses monday, I want to be able to track the status of an item in their account on a project board in my account so that when the item is done it can trigger an automation or notification within my account.

Make and Zapier workarounds wouldn’t achieve the type of functionality a native integration would allow, and would also rely on companies sharing APIs.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be handy for implementations, MS, and customer success boards. Unsure of the security implications though.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml: I think that’s why a native integration rather than a third party would be more attractive. The viewing permissions would already be linked to an email address, so would just be like linking to another workspace… just in a different account
